mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.SEQ) AS "totcnt" FROM STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO A, STOCKS_LIST B WHERE A.CODE = B.STOCKS_CODE(+)
AND A.GUBUN = #{searchBubun}
AND B.STOCKS_NAME LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
AND A.ACCOUNT LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%'

SELECT /*selectMyStockDetail*/ A.SEQ ,A.CODE AS STOCKS_CODE ,B.STOCKS_NAME ,A.QY ,A.GUBUN ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='STRE' AND CODE=A.GUBUN) AS GUBUN_NM ,A.DELNG_DE ,A.FEE ,A.TRFTAX ,A.INCMTAX ,A.UNIT_PRICE ,A.SELL_PRICE ,A.ACCOUNT ,(A.QY*A.UNIT_PRICE)-(A.FEE+A.TRFTAX+A.INCMTAX) AS TOTAL_PRICE ,A.RM ,TO_CHAR(A.REG_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO A, STOCKS_LIST B WHERE A.CODE = B.STOCKS_CODE(+) AND A.SEQ = #{pSeq}
mapper.insert: /*insertMyStock*/ INSERT INTO STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO ( SEQ, CODE, QY, GUBUN, DELNG_DE, FEE, TRFTAX, INCMTAX, UNIT_PRICE, SELL_PRICE, ACCOUNT, RM, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO.NEXTVAL , #{code}, NVL(#{qy},'0'), #{gubun}, NVL(#{delngDe},''), NVL(#{fee},'0'), NVL(#{trftax},'0'), NVL(#{incmtax},'0'), NVL(#{unitPrice},'0'), NVL(#{sellPrice},'0'), NVL(#{account},''), NVL(#{rm},''), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /*updateMyStock*/ UPDATE STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO SET CODE = #{code}, QY = NVL(#{qy},'1'), GUBUN = #{gubun}, DELNG_DE = #{delngDe}, FEE = NVL(#{fee},'0'), TRFTAX = NVL(#{trftax},'0'), INCMTAX = NVL(#{incmtax},'0'), UNIT_PRICE = NVL(#{unitPrice},'0'), SELL_PRICE = NVL(#{sellPrice},'0'), ACCOUNT = NVL(#{account},''), RM = #{rm} WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT /*selectMyStockHistDetail*/ B.SEQ ,B.P_SEQ ,A.CODE ,C.STOCKS_NAME ,B.QY ,B.GUBUN ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='STRE' AND CODE=B.GUBUN) AS GUBUN_NM ,B.DELNG_DE ,B.UNIT_PRICE ,(B.QY * B.UNIT_PRICE) AS TOTAL_PRICE ,B.RM ,TO_CHAR(B.UPD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPD_DATE ,TO_CHAR(B.REG_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM STOCKS_TRANSACTION_INFO A, STOCKS_TRANSACTION_HIST B, STOCKS_LIST C WHERE A.SEQ = B.P_SEQ AND A.CODE = C.STOCKS_CODE(+) AND B.SEQ = #{seq} AND B.P_SEQ = #{pSeq}
mapper.insert: /*insertMyStockHist*/ INSERT INTO STOCKS_TRANSACTION_HIST ( SEQ, P_SEQ, QY, GUBUN, DELNG_DE, UNIT_PRICE, RM, UPD_DATE, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_STOCKS_TRANSACTION_HIST.NEXTVAL , #{pSeq}, NVL(#{qy},'0'), #{gubun}, NVL(#{delngDe},''), NVL(#{unitPrice},'0'), NVL(#{rm},''), SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /*updateMyStockHist*/ UPDATE STOCKS_TRANSACTION_HIST SET QY = NVL(#{qy},'1'), GUBUN = #{gubun}, DELNG_DE = #{delngDe}, UNIT_PRICE = NVL(#{unitPrice},'0'), RM = #{rm}, UPD_DATE= SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
